children.text: benefits available under title XVI of the Social Security Act ( et seq.) (or assistance under a State program established in accordance with such title);42 U.S.C. 1381
medical assistance available under title XIX of such Act ( et seq.); and42 U.S.C. 1396
benefits available under the Food and Nutrition Act of 2008 ( et seq.).7 U.S.C. 2011

provide to older individuals with greatest economic need information and assistance regarding their eligibility to receive the benefits and assistance described in paragraphs (1) through (3) of subsection (a);
be carried out in a planning and service area that has a high proportion of older individuals with greatest economic need, relative to the aggregate number of older individuals in such area; and
be coordinated with State and local entities that administer benefits under such titles.
